creator: jim@luna.cdrom.com
text:
On Thu, 30 Mar 2000 at 02:23:54 +0000, Nathan wrote:
> >Number:         17677
> >Category:       docs
> >Synopsis:       stable-supfile example still has default RELENG_3 tag
> >Confidential:   yes

[snip..]

> The stable-supfile example in /usr/share/examples/cvsup still talks
> only of RELENG_3 and RELENG_2_2 and it is set to RELENG_3 for
> default. I would guess it should be RELENG_4 for 4.0, no?

Cvsup and look at that directory again.  You should have a
4.x-stable-supfile.  Can I close this?

- jim
